name: aaa-a
description: The lightweight "Act-Arrange-Assert" oriented testing framework, with a new "After" addition

scripts.watch: npm run clean && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json -watch
scripts.build: npm run clean && npx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build-debug: npm run clean && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build-test: npm run clean && npx tsc -p tsconfig.test.json

author: Llorx
